description: The production manager for a concert has determined they don't need a block of seats that was on hold, and they can now be sold to the public.

nodes.task_description: Receive the request from the production manager to release the hold on a specific block of seats.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the seats to be released (e.g., Section 101, Rows A-E).

nodes.task_description: Access the ticketing system and remove the 'Production Hold' status from the seats.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the status of the seats.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the seats are now available for sale on the public website.

expected_outcome.value: Agent checks the website and confirms the seats are listed for sale.
